info.title: Diabetes 360 API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for Diabetes 360 health management application

tags.name: Health Metrics
tags.description: Health metrics tracking and management endpoints

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return

post.summary: Authenticate user and get access tokens
Refresh access token using refresh token

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired refresh token

post.summary: Logout user and invalidate refresh token

400.description: Bad request - invalid token or validation error

404.description: Reset token not found or expired

post.summary: Add a new health metric entry

400.description: Bad request - validation error or limit exceeded

get.summary: Get the latest health metric for the current user
Get paginated health metrics for the current user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of metrics to return

get.summary: Get health metrics for chart visualization

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of data to retrieve

get.summary: Get today's metric count(s) for the current user

parameters.name: metricType
parameters.description: Optional - Get count for specific metric type. If omitted, returns counts for all types.

oneOf.description: When metricType query param is provided
When metricType query param is omitted

get.description: Returns the current free tier limits for glucose, steps, and water intake metrics

post.description: Create new free tier limits. Will fail if limits already exist.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

400.description: Bad request - validation error or limits already exist

put.summary: Create or update free tier limits (Admin only)
put.description: Upsert operation - creates limits if they don't exist, or updates if they do

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

patch.summary: Partially update free tier limits (Admin only)
patch.description: Update only specified limit fields. Limits must already exist.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users
